arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ الدَّوْلِيِّ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ. ذَهَبْتُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِ الْجَوَازَاتِ لِخَتْمِ جَوَازِ سَفَرِي. بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، انْتَظَرْتُ حَقِيبَتِي عِنْدَ حِزَامِ الْأَمْتِعَةِ. كَانَ الْمَطَارُ مُزْدَحِمًا جِدًّا بِالْمُسَافِرِينَ. أَخِيرًا، رَكِبْتُ سَيَّارَةَ أُجْرَةٍ لِلذَّهَابِ إِلَى الْفُنْدُقِ.
translation: Stigao sam na međunarodni aerodrom rano ujutro. Otišao sam do pasoške kontrole kako bih pečatirao svoj pasoš. Nakon toga sam čekao svoju torbu na traci za prtljag. Aerodrom je bio veoma krcat putnicima. Na kraju sam uzeo taksi da odem do hotela.
translationEn: I arrived at the international airport early in the morning. I went to the passport office to stamp my passport. After that, I waited for my bag at the luggage belt. The airport was very crowded with travelers. Finally, I took a taxi to go to the hotel.
